ham.subject: This Week’s Product Highlights & Exclusive Offers
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Hope you’re all doing well! Here’s what’s new for this week:

• **Smart Home Hub 2.0** – Now with voice‑control integration and a sleek design. Get a 15% discount if you order by Friday.
• **Eco‑Friendly Kitchen Set** – 3‑piece set made from recycled materials. Limited stock, so grab yours before it’s gone!
• **Summer Bundle** – Buy any two items from our summer range and receive a free tote bag.

Check out the full catalog on our website and let me know if you’d like any samples for the upcoming product demo.

Thank you for your continued support.

Best regards,

Rahul Sharma
Marketing Team
XYZ Pvt. Ltd.

spam.subject: ⚠️ Immediate Action Required: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We have noticed unusual activity on your Microsoft 365 account. As a security measure, your password will expire in 3 days. If you do not update your password within this timeframe, your account may be temporarily locked to protect your data.

Please verify your credentials by clicking the link below:

<URL>

After completing the verification process, you will receive a confirmation email. If you do not complete this action within 24 hours, your account will be permanently suspended.

Kripya jaldi se action lein to avoid any inconvenience. For any queries, contact our support team at support@company.com.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

Microsoft 365 Security Team
